feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Dirt Bikes For Kids

link.title: Dirt Bikes For Kids

entry.content: Here is a list of 37 dirt bikes for kids from manufacturers such as Honda, KTM, Husqvarna, Kawasaki, Yamaha, Suzuki, and TM.
entry.summary: Here is a list of 37 dirt bikes for kids from manufacturers such as Honda, KTM, Husqvarna, Kawasaki, Yamaha, Suzuki, and TM.

entry.title: ABD’de sahilde köpekbalığı paniği

link.title: ABD’de sahilde köpekbalığı paniği

entry.content:
ABD’nin Massachusetts eyaletinde polis, sahile yaklaşık 45 metre yakınlarda 2 büyük beyaz köpekbalığının tespit edildiğini duyurdu. Polis helikopteri ile kaydedilen görüntülerde, tatilciler uyarıldı.
ABD’de Massachusetts Polis Teşkilatı, Cod Burnu’nda sahile yaklaşık 45 mesafede 2 büyük beyaz köpekbalığının tespit edildiğini duyurdu. Polisten yapılan açıklamada, Cumartesi günü, öğleden sonra MSP helikopteri Air 4 mürettebatı, Wellfleet’teki Newcomb Hollow Plajı’nda kıyıdan yaklaşık 45 metre uzakta 2 büyük beyaz köpekbalığı tespit etti. Uçuş ekibi yerel polise iki köpekbalığının yerini bildirdi. Sahildekiler, o sabah daha erken bir saatte tespit edilen köpekbalığı nedeniyle sudan çıkarılmıştı. MSP Air 4’ün onaylanmış ek görüşlerine dayanarak, suya girme yasağı uzatıldı’ ifadelerine yer verildi.
entry.summary: ABD’nin Massachusetts eyaletinde polis, sahile yaklaşık 45 metre yakınlarda 2 büyük beyaz köpekbalığının tespit edildiğini duyurdu. Polis helikopteri ile kaydedilen görüntülerde, tatilciler uyarıldı. ABD’de Massachusetts Polis Teşkilatı, Cod Burnu’nda sahile yaklaşık 45 mesafede 2 büyük beyaz köpekbalığının tespit edildiğini duyurdu. Polisten yapılan açıklamada, Cumartesi günü, öğleden sonra MSP helikopteri Air 4 mürettebatı, Wellfleet’teki Newcomb Hollow Plajı’nda kıyıdan yaklaşık 45 metre uzakta 2 büyük beyaz köpekbalığı tespit etti. Uçuş ekibi yerel polise iki köpekbalığının yerini bildirdi. Sahildekiler, o sabah daha erken bir saatte tespit edilen köpekbalığı nedeniyle sudan çıkarılmıştı. MSP Air 4’ün onaylanmış ek görüşlerine dayanarak, suya girme yasağı uzatıldı’ ifadelerine yer verildi.

entry.title: How To SURVIVE In The Premier League Next Season! Sunday Vibes

link.title: How To SURVIVE In The Premier League Next Season! Sunday Vibes

entry.content:
Leeds walked the Championship in the end but with an over reliance on Patrick Bamford could they look to bring in one of Ollie Watkins, Chelsea’s Michy Batshuayi or Bournemouth’s Callum Wilson this summer?
As for West Brom Slaven Bilic’s men scraped over the line, but with a lack of Premier League experience could they look to bring in Man United’s Jesse Lingard or Arsenal’s Reiss Nelson. And could Man City’s John Stones, seemingly not wanted by Pep Guardiola, become their rock at the back?
And finally we look at play off winners Fulham. Scott Parker’s side struggled in parts this season and were hugely reliant on Mitrovic’s goals. Could the likes of Gerard Deulofeu, Ismaila Sarr or Chris Smalling help them out?
As if that wasn’t enough we discuss whether Arsenal should look to bring in Willian and whether they could offload Mesut Ozil this season.
entry.summary: Leeds walked the Championship in the end but with an over reliance on Patrick Bamford could they look to bring in one of Ollie Watkins, Chelsea’s Michy Batshuayi or Bournemouth’s Callum Wilson this summer? As for West Brom Slaven Bilic’s men scraped over the line, but with a lack of Premier League experience could they look to bring in Man United’s Jesse Lingard or Arsenal’s Reiss Nelson. And could Man City’s John Stones, seemingly not wanted by Pep Guardiola, become their rock at the back? And finally we look at play off winners Fulham. Scott Parker’s side struggled in parts this season and were hugely reliant on Mitrovic’s goals. Could the likes of Gerard Deulofeu, Ismaila Sarr or Chris Smalling help them out? As if that wasn’t enough we discuss whether Arsenal should look to bring in Willian and whether they could offload Mesut Ozil this season.

entry.title: Nepal में Ayodhya की तर्ज पर Ram Mandir का निर्माण, PM KP Oli ने दिए निर्देश वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Nepal में Ayodhya की तर्ज पर Ram Mandir का निर्माण, PM KP Oli ने दिए निर्देश वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Nepal’s Prime Minister KP Sharma Oli has said to build a grand temple of Lord Ram in his country. According to the National News Committee, the official news agency of Nepal, Prime Minister Oli has called and instructed the local public representatives of Thori and Madi to call Kathmandu and make all necessary preparations to build a grand temple on Lord Sri Ram’s birthplace. He has asked to change the name of Thori to Ayodhyapuri.
नेपाल के प्रधानमंत्री के पी शर्मा ओली ने अपने देश में भगवान राम का भव्य मंदिर बनाने की बात कही है. नेपाल की सरकारी समाचार एजेंसी राष्ट्रीय समाचार समिति के मुताबिक प्रधानमंत्री ओली ने फोन करके ठोरी और माडी के स्थानीय जनप्रतिनिधियों को काठमांडू बुलाकर भगवान श्रीराम की जन्मभूमि पर भव्य मंदिर बनाने के लिए सभी आवश्यक तैयारी करने के निर्देश दिए हैं. उन्होंने ठोरी का नाम बदलकर अयोध्यापुरी रखने के लिए कहा है.
#Neapl #RamMandir #KPSharmaOli
entry.summary: Nepal’s Prime Minister KP Sharma Oli has said to build a grand temple of Lord Ram in his country. According to the National News Committee, the official news agency of Nepal, Prime Minister Oli has called and instructed the local public representatives of Thori and Madi to call Kathmandu and make all necessary preparations to build a grand temple on Lord Sri Ram’s birthplace. He has asked to change the name of Thori to Ayodhyapuri. नेपाल के प्रधानमंत्री के पी शर्मा ओली ने अपने देश में भगवान राम का भव्य मंदिर बनाने की बात कही है. नेपाल की सरकारी समाचार एजेंसी राष्ट्रीय समाचार समिति के मुताबिक प्रधानमंत्री ओली ने फोन करके ठोरी और माडी के स्थानीय जनप्रतिनिधियों को काठमांडू बुलाकर भगवान श्रीराम की जन्मभूमि पर भव्य मंदिर बनाने के लिए सभी आवश्यक तैयारी करने के निर्देश दिए हैं. उन्होंने ठोरी का नाम बदलकर अयोध्यापुरी रखने के लिए कहा है. #Neapl #RamMandir #KPSharmaOli

entry.title: ‘Judas and the Black Messiah’ Trailer Is Here, ‘Friends’ Reunion Delayed at HBO Max & More THR News

link.title: ‘Judas and the Black Messiah’ Trailer Is Here, ‘Friends’ Reunion Delayed at HBO Max & More THR News

entry.content: President Donald Trump issued an executive order barring transactions with the Chinese tech firm ByteDance, the highly anticipated ‘Friends’ reunion special has been delayed once again and the first trailer for ‘Judas and the Black Messiah’ is here!
entry.summary: President Donald Trump issued an executive order barring transactions with the Chinese tech firm ByteDance, the highly anticipated ‘Friends’ reunion special has been delayed once again and the first trailer for ‘Judas and the Black Messiah’ is here!

entry.title: DSKS Protes Logo HUT RI Ke-75 Dianggap Menyerupai Simbol Salib

link.title: DSKS Protes Logo HUT RI Ke-75 Dianggap Menyerupai Simbol Salib

entry.content:
SOLO, KOMPAS.TV - Logo ulang tahun ke-75 Republik Indonesia diprotes Dewan Syariah Kota Surakarta, DSKS.
Salah satu desain logo dianggap menyerupai simbol salib.
Protes DSKS disampaikan ke Pemkot Solo setelah menemukan logo menyerupai simbol salib, terpasang di sejumlah lokasi.
DSKS menuntut pencopotan logo dengan alasan agar tidak menimbulkan keresahan di tengah masyarakat.
Kementerian Sekretariat Negara merilis logo ulang tahun ke-75 Republik Indonesia, disertai pedoman penggunaannya.
Dijelasakan, logo terdiri dari sepuluh bagian yang mencerminkan komitmen dan nilai luhur Pancasila, di antaranya fokus, kokoh, gotong royong dan berkembang.
Sepuluh bagian dirangkai menjadi kesatuan bentuk logo 75 tahun kemerdekaan Republik Indonesia.
Menurut Sekretaris Kementerian Sekretariat Negara, Setya Utama, pedoman sudah cukup menjelaskan dan melihatnya harus secara keseluruhan, tidak sepotong-sepotong.
entry.summary: SOLO, KOMPAS.TV - Logo ulang tahun ke-75 Republik Indonesia diprotes Dewan Syariah Kota Surakarta, DSKS. Salah satu desain logo dianggap menyerupai simbol salib. Protes DSKS disampaikan ke Pemkot Solo setelah menemukan logo menyerupai simbol salib, terpasang di sejumlah lokasi. DSKS menuntut pencopotan logo dengan alasan agar tidak menimbulkan keresahan di tengah masyarakat. Kementerian Sekretariat Negara merilis logo ulang tahun ke-75 Republik Indonesia, disertai pedoman penggunaannya. Dijelasakan, logo terdiri dari sepuluh bagian yang mencerminkan komitmen dan nilai luhur Pancasila, di antaranya fokus, kokoh, gotong royong dan berkembang. Sepuluh bagian dirangkai menjadi kesatuan bentuk logo 75 tahun kemerdekaan Republik Indonesia. Menurut Sekretaris Kementerian Sekretariat Negara, Setya Utama, pedoman sudah cukup menjelaskan dan melihatnya harus secara keseluruhan, tidak sepotong-sepotong.

entry.title: Cyberpunk 2077 - Refused: Becoming SAMURAI Music (2020)

link.title: Cyberpunk 2077 - Refused: Becoming SAMURAI Music (2020)

entry.content:
Go behind the scenes with CD PROJEKT RED and Refused to learn all about bringing the in-game chrome rock legends SAMURAI to life! Subscribe #XboxViewTV ➤
Cyberpunk 2077, an open-world, action-adventure story from CD PROJEKT RED, is coming to Xbox One, PS4 and PC November 19th, 2020.
Pre-order now:
About the game:
Cyberpunk 2077 is an open-world, action-adventure story set in Night City, a megalopolis obsessed with power, glamour and body modification. You play as V, a mercenary outlaw going after a one-of-a-kind implant that is the key to immortality. You can customize your character’s cyberware, skillset and playstyle, and explore a vast city where the choices you make shape the story and the world around you.
Learn more:
Music by David Sandström, Kristofer Steen, P.T. Adamczyk
Lyrics by David Sandström, Dennis Lyxzén
Mixed by Martin "Konie" Ehrencrona
Mastered by Magnus Lindberg
Executive Producer: P.T. Adamczyk
—
Connect with us!
▸Support us:
▸Dailymotion:
▸Facebook:
▸Twitter:
▸Twitch:
▸Web:
entry.summary: Go behind the scenes with CD PROJEKT RED and Refused to learn all about bringing the in-game chrome rock legends SAMURAI to life! Subscribe #XboxViewTV ➤ Cyberpunk 2077, an open-world, action-adventure story from CD PROJEKT RED, is coming to Xbox One, PS4 and PC November 19th, 2020. Pre-order now: About the game: Cyberpunk 2077 is an open-world, action-adventure story set in Night City, a megalopolis obsessed with power, glamour and body modification. You play as V, a mercenary outlaw going after a one-of-a-kind implant that is the key to immortality. You can customize your character’s cyberware, skillset and playstyle, and explore a vast city where the choices you make shape the story and the world around you. Learn more: Music by David Sandström, Kristofer Steen, P.T. Adamczyk Lyrics by David Sandström, Dennis Lyxzén Mixed by Martin "Konie" Ehrencrona Mastered by Magnus Lindberg Executive Producer: P.T. Adamczyk — Connect with us! ▸Support us: ▸Dailymotion: ▸Facebook: ▸Twitter: ▸Twitch: ▸Web:

entry.title: Sushant Case की CBI जांच की सिफारिश पर भड़के Sanjay Raut, कही ये बात FilmiBeat

link.title: Sushant Case की CBI जांच की सिफारिश पर भड़के Sanjay Raut, कही ये बात FilmiBeat

entry.content:
Shivsena leader Sanjay Raut said that Bihar Police is doing work to influence the investigation of Mumbai Police. If Bihar continues to fight like this with Maharashtra is not right.Watch Out
#SushantSinghRajput #SanjayRaut #CBI
entry.summary: Shivsena leader Sanjay Raut said that Bihar Police is doing work to influence the investigation of Mumbai Police. If Bihar continues to fight like this with Maharashtra is not right.Watch Out #SushantSinghRajput #SanjayRaut #CBI

entry.title: Perdana Menteri Lebanon Hassan Diab Tanggapi Ledakan di Beirut

link.title: Perdana Menteri Lebanon Hassan Diab Tanggapi Ledakan di Beirut

entry.content:
BEIRUT, KOMPAS.TV - Perdana Menteri Lebanon Hassan Diab telah berjanji, siapa pun yang bertanggung jawab atas ledakan besar yang mengguncang Beirut pada hari Selasa (4/8/2020) akan dibawa ke pengadilan.
Ledakan itu meratakan sebagian besar pelabuhan, merusak gedung-gedung di seluruh ibukota dan menimbulkan awan jamur raksasa ke langit.
Pejabat setempat mengatakan, setidaknya lebih dari 70 orang tewas dan 3.000 lainnya terluka, sebagian korban bahkan masih terkubur di reruntuhan.
Sejumlah rumah sakit di Beirut dengan cepat dipenuhi para korban ledakan. Sebagian besarnya membutuhkan pasokan darah dan generator agar listrik mereka tetap menyala.
Penyebab ledakan menurut seorang pejabat setempat, diduga oleh bahan peledak yang disita dari sebuah kapal beberapa waktu lalu dan disimpan di pelabuhan.
Saluran televisi lokal Lebanese Broadcasting Corporation (LBC) mengatakan bahan yang meledak itu itu adalah natrium nitrat.
Saksi mata melaporkan melihat awan berwarna oranye di sekitar lokasi, tidak lama setelah terjadi ledakan. Awan oranye dari gas nitrogen dioksida beracun sering menyertai ledakan yang melibatkan nitrat.
Ledakan tersebut dapat didengar dan dirasakan hingga Siprus, lebih dari 200 kilometer (180 mil) melintasi Mediterania.
entry.summary: BEIRUT, KOMPAS.TV - Perdana Menteri Lebanon Hassan Diab telah berjanji, siapa pun yang bertanggung jawab atas ledakan besar yang mengguncang Beirut pada hari Selasa (4/8/2020) akan dibawa ke pengadilan. Ledakan itu meratakan sebagian besar pelabuhan, merusak gedung-gedung di seluruh ibukota dan menimbulkan awan jamur raksasa ke langit. Pejabat setempat mengatakan, setidaknya lebih dari 70 orang tewas dan 3.000 lainnya terluka, sebagian korban bahkan masih terkubur di reruntuhan. Sejumlah rumah sakit di Beirut dengan cepat dipenuhi para korban ledakan. Sebagian besarnya membutuhkan pasokan darah dan generator agar listrik mereka tetap menyala. Penyebab ledakan menurut seorang pejabat setempat, diduga oleh bahan peledak yang disita dari sebuah kapal beberapa waktu lalu dan disimpan di pelabuhan. Saluran televisi lokal Lebanese Broadcasting Corporation (LBC) mengatakan bahan yang meledak itu itu adalah natrium nitrat. Saksi mata melaporkan melihat awan berwarna oranye di sekitar lokasi, tidak lama setelah terjadi ledakan. Awan oranye dari gas nitrogen dioksida beracun sering menyertai ledakan yang melibatkan nitrat. Ledakan tersebut dapat didengar dan dirasakan hingga Siprus, lebih dari 200 kilometer (180 mil) melintasi Mediterania.

entry.title: Ram stands for unity and welfare of all, Priyanka’s message ahead of ‘Bhoomi pujan’

link.title: Ram stands for unity and welfare of all, Priyanka’s message ahead of ‘Bhoomi pujan’

entry.content:
Ahead of Ram Mandir’s ‘Bhoomi pujan’ to be held on Wednesday, Priyanka Gandhi has released her message on the occasion. Priyanka has described how Ram belongs to all and symbolises Unity and welfare of all. Priyanka said Bhoomi pujan’ should bring a message of unity, solidarity and equality for all.
#PriyankaGandhi #Ayodhya #RamTemple #BhoomiPujan #Congress #BJP
entry.summary: Ahead of Ram Mandir’s ‘Bhoomi pujan’ to be held on Wednesday, Priyanka Gandhi has released her message on the occasion. Priyanka has described how Ram belongs to all and symbolises Unity and welfare of all. Priyanka said Bhoomi pujan’ should bring a message of unity, solidarity and equality for all. #PriyankaGandhi #Ayodhya #RamTemple #BhoomiPujan #Congress #BJP

entry.title: The Elder Scrolls Online - Stonethorn DLC Gameplay Trailer (2020)

link.title: The Elder Scrolls Online - Stonethorn DLC Gameplay Trailer (2020)

entry.content:
Continue (or begin!) your Dark Heart of Skyrim adventure with Stonethorn, a new DLC dungeon pack coming soon to The Elder Scrolls Online. Subscribe #XboxViewTV ➤
Assault an ancient fortress and halt a new vampiric invasion before it begins its march, and investigate the terrible creations of the mad alchemist Arkasis. What you discover shall not only have repercussions for the people of Skyrim, but all of Tamriel!
The Elder Scrolls Online: Stonethorn arrives August 24, 2020 for PC/Mac and Stadia* and September 1, 2020 for Xbox One and PlayStation 4.
*Available only in limited territories.
Official Site:
—
Connect with us!
▸Support us:
▸Dailymotion:
▸Facebook:
▸Twitter:
▸Twitch:
▸Web:
entry.summary: Continue (or begin!) your Dark Heart of Skyrim adventure with Stonethorn, a new DLC dungeon pack coming soon to The Elder Scrolls Online. Subscribe #XboxViewTV ➤ Assault an ancient fortress and halt a new vampiric invasion before it begins its march, and investigate the terrible creations of the mad alchemist Arkasis. What you discover shall not only have repercussions for the people of Skyrim, but all of Tamriel! The Elder Scrolls Online: Stonethorn arrives August 24, 2020 for PC/Mac and Stadia* and September 1, 2020 for Xbox One and PlayStation 4. *Available only in limited territories. entry.title: Covid-19 : des derniers chiffres inquiétants ?

link.title: Covid-19 : des derniers chiffres inquiétants ?

entry.content: En France le virus n’a de cesse de se propager ces derniers jours. Avec la période estivale, les gestes barrières et les précautions ne sont pas forcément toujours respectés par la population. Mais malgré cela, la situation continue d’être maîtrisée. De plus en plus de villes imposent le masque à l’extérieur, dans les lieux publics ou dans les rues très fréquentées. Au total plus d’une centaine de maires ont pris des arrêtés allant dans ce sens
entry.summary: En France le virus n’a de cesse de se propager ces derniers jours. Avec la période estivale, les gestes barrières et les précautions ne sont pas forcément toujours respectés par la population. Mais malgré cela, la situation continue d’être maîtrisée. De plus en plus de villes imposent le masque à l’extérieur, dans les lieux publics ou dans les rues très fréquentées. Au total plus d’une centaine de maires ont pris des arrêtés allant dans ce sens

entry.title: Un architecte français meurt dans les explosions de Beyrouth, un de ses amis témoigne

link.title: Un architecte français meurt dans les explosions de Beyrouth, un de ses amis témoigne

entry.content: Ghassan Hajjar, ami de Jean-Marc Bonfils, architecte français victime des explosions de Beyrouth, témoigne ce mercredi soir sur BFMTV.
entry.summary: Ghassan Hajjar, ami de Jean-Marc Bonfils, architecte français victime des explosions de Beyrouth, témoigne ce mercredi soir sur BFMTV.

entry.title: Rajasthan: 8वीं पास Ruma Devi ने कैसे बदली 22 हजार महिलाओं की जिंदगी, जानें सबकुछ वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Rajasthan: 8वीं पास Ruma Devi ने कैसे बदली 22 हजार महिलाओं की जिंदगी, जानें सबकुछ वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Dr. Ruma devi, who lives in Barmer, Rajasthan, is being praised all over the world. Eighth Pass Ruma Deva’s life began with struggles. Has suffered child marriage. But did not lose courage. There is a worldwide demand for handicraft products made by Ruma Devi group. Today Ruma Devi has given ‘job’ to 22 thousand women. Ruma Devi, who started the journey of life from a small village, has given a lecture at Harvard University.
राजस्थान के बाड़मेर की रहने वाली डॉ. रूमादेवी के हुनर और हौसले की तारीफ दुनियाभर में हो रही है. आठवीं पास रूमा देवा के जीवन की शुरुआत संघर्षों भरी रही। बाल विवाह का दंश झेला। लेकिन हौसला नहीं हारा. रूमा देवी के समूह के बनाए हस्तशिल्प उत्पादों की दुनियाभर में डिमांड है. रूमा देवी ने आज 22 हजार महिलाओं को ‘नौकरी’ दे रखी है। एक छोटे से गांव से जिंदगी के सफर की शुरुआत करने वाली रूमा देवी हार्वर्ड यूनिवर्सिटी में लेक्चर तक दे चुकी हैं.
#RumaDevi #RajasthanNews #BarmerRumaDevi
entry.summary: Dr. Ruma devi, who lives in Barmer, Rajasthan, is being praised all over the world. Eighth Pass Ruma Deva’s life began with struggles. Has suffered child marriage. But did not lose courage. There is a worldwide demand for handicraft products made by Ruma Devi group. Today Ruma Devi has given ‘job’ to 22 thousand women. Ruma Devi, who started the journey of life from a small village, has given a lecture at Harvard University. राजस्थान के बाड़मेर की रहने वाली डॉ. रूमादेवी के हुनर और हौसले की तारीफ दुनियाभर में हो रही है. आठवीं पास रूमा देवा के जीवन की शुरुआत संघर्षों भरी रही। बाल विवाह का दंश झेला। लेकिन हौसला नहीं हारा. रूमा देवी के समूह के बनाए हस्तशिल्प उत्पादों की दुनियाभर में डिमांड है. रूमा देवी ने आज 22 हजार महिलाओं को ‘नौकरी’ दे रखी है। एक छोटे से गांव से जिंदगी के सफर की शुरुआत करने वाली रूमा देवी हार्वर्ड यूनिवर्सिटी में लेक्चर तक दे चुकी हैं. #RumaDevi #RajasthanNews #BarmerRumaDevi

entry.title: Ram Mandir Rises: Ayodhya prepares for bhoomi pujan

link.title: Ram Mandir Rises: Ayodhya prepares for bhoomi pujan

entry.content: Work is on at fever pitch at the Ram Janmabhoomi site ahead of the bhoomi pujan ceremony on August 5 which will be attended by Prime Minister Narendra Modi and 175 other guests. We took a tour of the site ahead of the ceremony to look at the arrangements being done.The undulating patch of land at the Ram Janmabhoomi site, that had unregulated growth of vegetation due to years of restrictions laid down by the Supreme Court, has been cleared with earthmovers. The work is going on at full pace even through the night. A large shamiana (tent) has been erected at the site of the bhoomi pujan with adequate rain proofing to ensure that monsoon showers do not cause any disruption. One segment of the covered zone has been earmarked for the bhoomi pujan with a square patch measuring little over 400 square feet. The square area has been demarcated by 9 poles on which a tent with bright saffron fabric has been erected. watch to find ou more.
entry.summary: Work is on at fever pitch at the Ram Janmabhoomi site ahead of the bhoomi pujan ceremony on August 5 which will be attended by Prime Minister Narendra Modi and 175 other guests. We took a tour of the site ahead of the ceremony to look at the arrangements being done.The undulating patch of land at the Ram Janmabhoomi site, that had unregulated growth of vegetation due to years of restrictions laid down by the Supreme Court, has been cleared with earthmovers. The work is going on at full pace even through the night. A large shamiana (tent) has been erected at the site of the bhoomi pujan with adequate rain proofing to ensure that monsoon showers do not cause any disruption. One segment of the covered zone has been earmarked for the bhoomi pujan with a square patch measuring little over 400 square feet. The square area has been demarcated by 9 poles on which a tent with bright saffron fabric has been erected. watch to find ou more.

entry.title: Jean-François Delfraissy : ‘L’immunisation collective, c’est celle qu’a eu la population après la première vague. Aujourd’hui autour de 10% de la population a été en contact avec le virus. Pour protéger la population il faudrait atteindre 50 à 60%.’

link.title: Jean-François Delfraissy : ‘L’immunisation collective, c’est celle qu’a eu la population après la première vague. Aujourd’hui autour de 10% de la population a été en contact avec le virus. Pour protéger la population il faudrait atteindre 50 à 60%.’

entry.content:
Jean-François Delfraissy, infectiologue, président du Conseil scientifique sur le Covid-19, est l’invité du Grand entretien de France Inter.
Plus d’info:
entry.summary: Jean-François Delfraissy, infectiologue, président du Conseil scientifique sur le Covid-19, est l’invité du Grand entretien de France Inter. Plus d’info:

entry.title: Ayodhya Verdict Was Right ? Oneindia Malayalam

link.title: Ayodhya Verdict Was Right ? Oneindia Malayalam

entry.content:
Ayodhya Verdict Was Right ?
സ്വാതന്ത്രാനന്തരം തര്‍ക്കഭൂമിയായി നിലനിനിന്നിരുന്ന ഒരിടമായിരുന്നു ബാബറി മസ്ജിദ്. 1990 ല്‍ അദ്വാനിയുടെ നേതൃത്വത്തില്‍ നടന്ന രഥയാത്രയിലൂടെ ഭൂരിപക്ഷ ജനവിഭാഗത്തില്‍ വിഷം കുത്തിനിറച്ചതിന്റെ ഫലമായി കര്‍സേവകരുടെ ഒരു വലിയ കൂട്ടം ബാബറി മസ്ജിദ് ആക്രമിക്കുകയും പള്ളി പൊളിച്ചുനീക്കുകയും ചെയ്തു.ഭൂരിപക്ഷ മതത്തെയും സമൂഹത്തെയും സുഖിപ്പിച്ചു തങ്ങളുടെ ഭരണ പരാജയവും കുടിലതയും മറച്ചു വെക്കുന്ന രാഷ്ട്രീയ തന്ത്രത്തെ ആണ് ദേശീയത എന്നു പറയുന്നത്.
entry.summary: Ayodhya Verdict Was Right ? സ്വാതന്ത്രാനന്തരം തര്‍ക്കഭൂമിയായി നിലനിനിന്നിരുന്ന ഒരിടമായിരുന്നു ബാബറി മസ്ജിദ്. 1990 ല്‍ അദ്വാനിയുടെ നേതൃത്വത്തില്‍ നടന്ന രഥയാത്രയിലൂടെ ഭൂരിപക്ഷ ജനവിഭാഗത്തില്‍ വിഷം കുത്തിനിറച്ചതിന്റെ ഫലമായി കര്‍സേവകരുടെ ഒരു വലിയ കൂട്ടം ബാബറി മസ്ജിദ് ആക്രമിക്കുകയും പള്ളി പൊളിച്ചുനീക്കുകയും ചെയ്തു.ഭൂരിപക്ഷ മതത്തെയും സമൂഹത്തെയും സുഖിപ്പിച്ചു തങ്ങളുടെ ഭരണ പരാജയവും കുടിലതയും മറച്ചു വെക്കുന്ന രാഷ്ട്രീയ തന്ത്രത്തെ ആണ് ദേശീയത എന്നു പറയുന്നത്.

entry.title: Nuovo ponte Genova, dal Morandi al San Giorgio: la ricostruzione due anni dopo il crollo

link.title: Nuovo ponte Genova, dal Morandi al San Giorgio: la ricostruzione due anni dopo il crollo

entry.content: Lunedì 3 agosto si celebrerà l’inaugurazione del nuovo Ponte di Genova che sarà aperto, al traffico, a partire da mercoledì 5: in occasione dell’inaugurazione, il viadotto avrà i colori del tricolore italiano e della bandiera di San Giorgio e, se il tempo lo consentirà, ci saranno delle frecce tricolori che disegnano il vessillo di Genova nel cielo.
entry.summary: Lunedì 3 agosto si celebrerà l’inaugurazione del nuovo Ponte di Genova che sarà aperto, al traffico, a partire da mercoledì 5: in occasione dell’inaugurazione, il viadotto avrà i colori del tricolore italiano e della bandiera di San Giorgio e, se il tempo lo consentirà, ci saranno delle frecce tricolori che disegnano il vessillo di Genova nel cielo.

entry.title: Sebelum Hilang Terseret Ombak, Joko Widodo Sempat Update Status WhatsApp

link.title: Sebelum Hilang Terseret Ombak, Joko Widodo Sempat Update Status WhatsApp

entry.content:
Sebanyak tujuh orang warga Kecamatan Tempel, Sleman, terseret ombak, kala berwisata ke Pantai Goa Cemara, Bantul, Kamis (6/8/2020). Dua dari tujuh korban telah ditemukan tim penyelamat dalam kondisi meninggal dunia, lima lainnya dalam pencarian.
Link berita:
Kepala Dusun Rebobong Lor, Desa Mororejo, Suryadi menjelaskan, hingga saat ini jenazah korban yang ditemukan meninggal dunia belum sampai di rumah duka. Sedangkan korban lainnya kabarnya masih simpang siur. Selengkapnya, tonton dalam video ini.
#JokoWidodo #TerseretOmbak #JokowiHilangTerseretOmbak
Video Editor: Heriyanto
===================================
Homepage:
Facebook Fan Page:
Instagram:
Twitter:
entry.summary: Sebanyak tujuh orang warga Kecamatan Tempel, Sleman, terseret ombak, kala berwisata ke Pantai Goa Cemara, Bantul, Kamis (6/8/2020). Dua dari tujuh korban telah ditemukan tim penyelamat dalam kondisi meninggal dunia, lima lainnya dalam pencarian. Link berita: Kepala Dusun Rebobong Lor, Desa Mororejo, Suryadi menjelaskan, hingga saat ini jenazah korban yang ditemukan meninggal dunia belum sampai di rumah duka. Sedangkan korban lainnya kabarnya masih simpang siur. Selengkapnya, tonton dalam video ini. #JokoWidodo #TerseretOmbak #JokowiHilangTerseretOmbak Video Editor: Heriyanto =================================== Homepage: Facebook Fan Page: Instagram: Twitter:

entry.title: Defence Equipment के इंपोर्ट पर बैन को लेकर P.Chidamabaram का तंज,कही ये बात वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Defence Equipment के इंपोर्ट पर बैन को लेकर P.Chidamabaram का तंज,कही ये बात वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
On Sunday, Defense Minister Rajnath Singh made an important announcement, declaring a ban on the import of 101 defense products. According to him, the Ministry of Defense will now move forward under self-reliant India. At the same time, Congress leader P Chidambaram targeted Rajnath Singh’s announcement. He said that Rajnath Singh’s declaration of ban on import of defense products is just jargon
रक्षा मंत्री राजनाथ सिंह ने रविवार को अहम घोषणा करते हुए 101 रक्षा उत्‍पादों के आयात पर रोक लगाने की घोषणा की. उनके मुताबिक रक्षा मंत्रालय अब आत्‍मनिर्भर भारत के तहत आगे बढ़ेगा. वहीं राजनाथ सिंह की इस घोषणा पर कांग्रेस नेता पी चिदंबरम ने निशाना साधा. उन्‍होंने कहा कि राजनाथ सिंह ने रक्षा उत्‍पादों के आयात पर प्रतिबंध की जो घोषणा की है, वह केवल शब्दजाल है,
#RajnathSingh #AtmanirbharBharat #DefenceMinistry
entry.summary: On Sunday, Defense Minister Rajnath Singh made an important announcement, declaring a ban on the import of 101 defense products. According to him, the Ministry of Defense will now move forward under self-reliant India. At the same time, Congress leader P Chidambaram targeted Rajnath Singh’s announcement. He said that Rajnath Singh’s declaration of ban on import of defense products is just jargon रक्षा मंत्री राजनाथ सिंह ने रविवार को अहम घोषणा करते हुए 101 रक्षा उत्‍पादों के आयात पर रोक लगाने की घोषणा की. उनके मुताबिक रक्षा मंत्रालय अब आत्‍मनिर्भर भारत के तहत आगे बढ़ेगा. वहीं राजनाथ सिंह की इस घोषणा पर कांग्रेस नेता पी चिदंबरम ने निशाना साधा. उन्‍होंने कहा कि राजनाथ सिंह ने रक्षा उत्‍पादों के आयात पर प्रतिबंध की जो घोषणा की है, वह केवल शब्दजाल है, #RajnathSingh #AtmanirbharBharat #DefenceMinistry

entry.title: Coronavirus : depuis le début de la crise, ‘c’est un flot incessant de fausses informations’

link.title: Coronavirus : depuis le début de la crise, ‘c’est un flot incessant de fausses informations’

entry.content:
Retrouvez "Culture médias" sur :

Coronavirus : depuis le début de la crise, ‘c’est un flot incessant de fausses informations’
Coronavirus : depuis le début de la crise, ‘c’est un flot incessant de fausses informations’
